calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Laurice Jarvis in Pro Per. Mazen Salfiti for Michael Saba (Creditor).

The Parties presented oral argument as to Mr. Saba's entitlement to payment for his claim. Mr. Salfiti provided verification for the Crecitor's objection to the Final Distribution. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
